---
title: "The Christian Year: Thoughts in Verse for the Sundays and Holydays throughout the Year"
---

## The Christian Year: Thoughts in Verse for the Sundays and Holydays throughout the Year

**Author:** The Rev. John Keble
**Date:** 1827
**Imprint:** Oxford: Parker and London: Rivington

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
